name: Rodion's Game
description:
Rodion, dying of boredom on the bus, decides to create a little game of chance to play with the other sinners. You're her "beta tester" as you run through a few (or many) rounds. A big wheel of random acts is spun and Rodion reveals whatever it lands upon.

The bot is (intended) to pull from a big list of results I've manually added in. Be aware there's kinks of all varieties in there even ones I don't like because gambling is no fun if there's not a bad outcome. Dead dove is here because of some of these but i never got it to spin one of those options anyways so do with that information what you may.

It's fairly lean on lore details in order to fit the game and Rodion, so if the game leaves the bus it'll likely get confused and need handholding. The intro is very short for the same reason. This also isn't intended to be a Rodion character study, she isn't going to drop her facade for you or get serious. There are other bots for such things.

Anyways, this is primarily an experimental bot so there will likely be a lot of bugs. Make sure to keep track of things such as clothing changes and other tasks that persist in the memory. I also recommend manually updating it for keeping track of such things.

Finally, if this seems to be working well, I'll likely continue to update it with more wheel results. In my testing thus far the coin flip has been the biggest problem point, so if anybody has a more clever solution to achieve a similar effect, I'd love to hear it. Thank you for enduring my yapping and have fun! <3
creator: EvilAssMf
